instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `initialsAvatar` that derives two-letter initials from a `fullName` string and renders them inside a span with class `avatar`. Escape the initials output.
code: <#-- Macro: initialsAvatar(fullName) --> <#macro initialsAvatar fullName> <#assign parts = (fullName!"")?trim?split("\\s+", "r")> <#assign initials = ""> <#list parts as part> <#if part?has_content && initials?length < 2> <#assign initials = initials + part?substring(0, 1)?upper_case> ${initials?html}
